docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR 1/28/03 @ 9:00AM IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT STILLMAN, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-28-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-13-2003
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-26-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STILLMAN, CHRISTOPHER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-28-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STILLMAN, CHRISTOPHER
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-28-2003. APR-02-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT EUGENE GONZALES APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-28-2003 THROUGH JUL-27-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-02-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-02-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR/DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
